hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.env|*/Cargo.lock|*/yarn.lock) echo "Blocked: $f is protected (secret or lockfile). Edit it by hand, or update lockfiles via cargo/yarn — not through Claude." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

{ f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.rs) cargo fmt --all ;; *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.md|*.json) node_modules/.bin/prettier --config prettier.config.js --ignore-path .prettierignore --write "$f" ;; esac ; } 2>/dev/null || true
